purpose: curate recent high-quality Wikipedia articles to avoid data leakage during pre-training, evaluate capacity LLM systems generating long-form grounded articles from scratch and pre-writing challenge
creation: top 100 most-edited pages based on edit counts for each month from Feb 2022 to Sep 2023 via https://wikimedia.org/api/rest_v1/metrics/edited-pages/top-by-edits/en.wikipedia/all-editor-types/content/{year}/{month}/all-days, filter keep only B-class quality or above assessed by ORES https://www.mediawiki.org/wiki/ORES, exclude list articles https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Wikipedia:Stand-alone_lists and articles that have no subsections, only plain text component

example.ground_truth_outline_human:
# Background
## Bidding process
## Venue
# Opening ceremony
## Parade of Nations
## Artistic program
## Oath
# Reception
# Broadcasting
example.ground_truth_filtered: B-class quality, has subsections, not list article

repeatability: process can be repeated at future dates when new LLMs emerge
